name: GaugeFlow Gate A6 discrete atom-type substrate v1
objective: Replace the failed continuous 119-element atom-type path with a mathematically defined discrete probability flow, then qualify only endpoint-ID type generation before further geometry or tensor work.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: A/A1/A2/A3/A4/A5 reports, thresholds, splits, checkpoints and conclusions remain immutable. A6 is a new type-only substrate protocol.

gate_a5: A5's exact simplex and quotient invariants passed on CUDA, but full-119 simplex endpoint-ID composition reached only 0.3125.

The A4 categorical diagnostic repeatedly argmaxed classifier outputs; it did not define a discrete probability velocity, transition kernel, or posterior sampler, so it was not a valid discrete-flow baseline.
The unresolved type failure blocks tensor conditioning and geometry/joint qualification remains separate.

literature.citation: Gat et al., Discrete Flow Matching, 2024
literature.use: Use an endpoint posterior with a specified discrete probability path and sample through its generating transition probabilities rather than applying argmax at every step.

literature.citation: Campbell et al., A Continuous Time Framework for Discrete Denoising Models, 2022
literature.use: Use an absorbing non-chemical mask source and a continuous-time jump process for categorical denoising.

discrete_path.source: one absorbing non-chemical mask token, index 119
discrete_path.chemical_vocabulary: all 119 element classes; no target-specific pruning
discrete_path.posterior_objective: cross entropy for endpoint y from x_t, t and endpoint-ID condition
discrete_path.sampler: masked tokens reveal with exact linear-schedule hazard 1/(S-step), then sample their endpoint class from posterior logits; revealed tokens stay fixed

endpoint_id_type_substrate.condition: two-class endpoint ID only; no tensor, orbit, oracle, target CIF, target lattice or target symmetry condition is passed as a condition
endpoint_id_type_substrate.note: For type-only qualification the true coordinate and lattice endpoint remain fixed, exactly as in A4/A5; this isolates species generation.

decision_rules.pass: The type substrate is qualified only. Propose a separate versioned geometry-only repair; do not yet start tensor conditioning or joint generation.
decision_rules.fail: Do not return to Euclidean/simplex atom-type flow or target-specific vocabularies. Audit endpoint-ID information access and graph-wise discrete posterior capacity before any additional conditional work.
